mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS avgScore, COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id) AS totalEmployees, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id), 0), 1) AS evaluationRate, SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status IS NULL OR qe.status = 'NO_INPUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unevaluatedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierSCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierACount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierBCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierCCount FROM employee e LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 AND qe.evaluation_period_id = ( SELECT ep.eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period ep WHERE ep.eval_year = #{year} AND ep.eval_sequence = #{evalSequence} LIMIT 1 ) WHERE e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.employee_tier IN ('S', 'A', 'B', 'C')

SELECT qe.evaluatee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, qe.score AS qualitativeScore, qe.grade, qe.status AS evalStatus FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id JOIN evaluation_period ep ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id WHERE ep.eval_year = #{year} AND ep.eval_sequence = #{evalSequence} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 ORDER BY qe.score DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT qe.evaluatee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, qe.score AS qualitativeScore, qe.grade, qe.status AS evalStatus FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id JOIN evaluation_period ep ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id WHERE ep.eval_year = #{year} AND ep.eval_sequence = #{evalSequence} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 ORDER BY qe.score DESC

SELECT ep.eval_year AS year, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS avgScore, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierSCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierACount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierBCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierCCount FROM ( SELECT eval_period_id, eval_year, eval_sequence FROM evaluation_period WHERE eval_year <= #{year} ORDER BY eval_year DESC, eval_sequence DESC LIMIT 6 ) ep JOIN employee e ON e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.employee_tier IN ('S', 'A', 'B', 'C') LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id AND qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 GROUP BY ep.eval_year, ep.eval_sequence ORDER BY ep.eval_year, ep.eval_sequence

SELECT d.department_id AS departmentId, d.department_name AS departmentName, COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id) AS memberCount, ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS avgScore, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierSCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierACount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierBCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierCCount FROM department d JOIN employee e ON e.department_id = d.department_id AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.employee_tier IN ('S', 'A', 'B', 'C') LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 AND qe.evaluation_period_id = ( SELECT ep.eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period ep WHERE ep.eval_year = #{year} AND ep.eval_sequence = #{evalSequence} LIMIT 1 ) WHERE COALESCE(d.is_deleted, 0) = 0 GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name ORDER BY d.department_name

SELECT ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS teamAvgScore, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status IS NOT NULL AND qe.status != 'NO_INPUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id), 0), 1) AS evaluationRate, SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount, /* 이번 평가 결과(qe.grade)가 있으면 우선 사용, 없으면 현재 등급(e.employee_tier) 사용 */ SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierSCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierACount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierBCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierCCount FROM employee tl JOIN employee e ON e.department_id = tl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 1 AND qe.evaluation_period_id = ( SELECT ep.eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period ep WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY ep.start_date DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE tl.employee_id = #{tlId}

SELECT e.employee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_code AS employeeCode, e.employee_tier AS tier, qe.score AS qualitativeScore, qe.grade, qe.status AS evalStatus FROM employee tl JOIN employee e ON e.department_id = tl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 1 AND qe.evaluation_period_id = ( SELECT ep.eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period ep WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY ep.start_date DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE tl.employee_id = #{tlId} ORDER BY qe.score IS NULL, qe.score DESC, e.employee_name LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee tl JOIN employee e ON e.department_id = tl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE tl.employee_id = #{tlId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS deptAvgScore, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status IS NOT NULL AND qe.status != 'NO_INPUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id), 0), 1) AS evaluationRate, SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status IS NULL OR qe.status = 'NO_INPUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unevaluatedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierSCount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierACount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierBCount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierCCount FROM employee dl JOIN employee e ON e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( e.department_id = dl.department_id OR e.department_id IN ( SELECT d.department_id FROM department d WHERE d.parent_department_id = dl.department_id AND COALESCE(d.is_deleted, 0) = 0 ) ) LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 2 AND qe.evaluation_period_id = ( SELECT ep.eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period ep WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY ep.start_date DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE dl.employee_id = #{dlId}

SELECT tl_emp.employee_id AS tlId, tl_emp.employee_name AS tlName, d_team.department_name AS teamName, COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id) AS memberCount, ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS teamAvgScore, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id) = 0 THEN '인원없음' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status = 'NO_INPUT' OR qe.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN '평가완료' ELSE '심사중' END AS evaluationStatus FROM employee dl JOIN department d_team ON d_team.parent_department_id = dl.department_id AND COALESCE(d_team.is_deleted, 0) = 0 LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.department_id = d_team.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 1 AND qe.evaluation_period_id = ( SELECT ep.eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period ep WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY ep.start_date DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN employee tl_emp ON tl_emp.department_id = d_team.department_id AND tl_emp.employee_role = 'TL' WHERE dl.employee_id = #{dlId} GROUP BY tl_emp.employee_id, tl_emp.employee_name, d_team.department_name ORDER BY teamAvgScore DESC

SELECT e.employee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_code AS employeeCode, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, d_team.department_name AS teamName, qe.score AS qualitativeScore, qe.grade, qe.status AS evalStatus FROM employee dl JOIN employee e ON e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( e.department_id = dl.department_id OR e.department_id IN ( SELECT d.department_id FROM department d WHERE d.parent_department_id = dl.department_id AND COALESCE(d.is_deleted, 0) = 0 ) ) JOIN department d_team ON d_team.department_id = e.department_id LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 2 AND qe.evaluation_period_id = ( SELECT ep.eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period ep WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY ep.start_date DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE dl.employee_id = #{dlId} ORDER BY qe.score IS NULL, qe.score DESC, e.employee_name LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee dl JOIN employee e ON e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( e.department_id = dl.department_id OR e.department_id IN ( SELECT d.department_id FROM department d WHERE d.parent_department_id = dl.department_id AND COALESCE(d.is_deleted, 0) = 0 ) ) WHERE dl.employee_id = #{dlId}
